mapper.select: SELECT sys_id as sysId , menu_id as menuId , menu_nm as menuNm , parent_menu_id as parentMenuId , menu_url as menuUrl , menu_depth as menuDepth , sort_sn as sortOrder FROM zzz_menu_info WHERE sys_id = #{sysId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY menu_depth ASC, sort_sn ASC

SELECT DISTINCT A.sys_id AS sysId , A.menu_id AS menuId , A.menu_nm AS menuNm , A.parent_menu_id AS parentMenuId , A.menu_url AS menuUrl , A.menu_depth AS menuDepth , A.sort_sn AS sortOrder FROM zzz_menu_info A JOIN zzz_role_auth B ON A.sys_id = B.sys_id AND A.menu_id = B.menu_cd JOIN zzz_role_user_auth C ON B.sys_id = C.sys_id AND B.role_cd = C.role_cd WHERE A.sys_id = #{sysId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND C.emp_id = #{userId} AND C.use_yn = 'Y' AND ( B.sel_auth_yn = 'Y' OR B.add_auth_yn = 'Y' OR B.mdfy_auth_yn = 'Y' OR B.del_auth_yn = 'Y' OR IFNULL(B.excl_up_auth_yn, 'N') = 'Y' OR IFNULL(B.excl_down_auth_yn, 'N') = 'Y' OR IFNULL(B.upld_auth_yn, 'N') = 'Y' OR IFNULL(B.down_auth_yn, 'N') = 'Y' ) ORDER BY A.menu_depth ASC, A.sort_sn ASC
